goal: Continue card numeric balancing by reworking the battleV2 card abstraction so runtime costs, effect values, and summon stats better reflect source card strength.
constraints: Keep the full active card pool and cardsSource chain unchanged.
Do not rewrite individual 170-card source records unless strictly required; prefer deterministic battleV2 mapping fixes.
Preserve the existing five battle card semantic buckets (立论/策术/玄章/门客/反诘) while improving numeric fairness.
Limit changes to targeted balance logic and avoid broad UI or architecture refactors.
deliverables: Updated runtime mapping for battle card cost/effectValue generation.
Summoned unit stats use better-balanced source-derived combat numbers.
Verification notes for the new numeric distribution and battle-facing impact.
